name: Beacan Bruithe (Baked Mushrooms) [Irish]
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the mushrooms and peel them.
2. Remove the stalks and discard.
3. Brush the mushrooms with melted butter.
4. Fry the onions in the remaining butter until tender.
5. Mix the cooked onion and butter with breadcrumbs, sausage meat, chopped sage, salt, and pepper.
6. Divide the mixture among the mushrooms.
7. Place the mushrooms in a shallow ovenproof dish.
8. Pour 4 tablespoons of water into the bottom of the dish.
9. Bake for 15-20 minutes in a moderate oven.
